lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is like new and shows no signs of wear. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor wear and small scratches from regular use, while the interior is clean and well-maintained. It is fully operational and requires no immediate mechanical repairs.

This vehicle is in good condition and reflects careful ownership. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the front end and some light surface scratches consistent with careful use. The interior is very clean; the upholstery is intact, and all electronics function as intended, showing only minimal wear on high-touch surfaces like the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound, starts reliably, and has been serviced regularly. It is a solid, well-kept vehicle that is ready for immediate use.
Looking for a dependable ride at a fantastic value? This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some honest signs of wear but still offering a solid and reliable driving experience

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering a practical choice for those seeking budget-friendly transportation. The exterior shows visible wear, including surface scratches and a small dent on the passenger door. The interior is functional but shows significant signs of use and some staining on the carpet. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are operational, though the car would benefit from a tune-up and new brake pads soon. It is a reliable runner that prioritizes value and utility.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive reliability, this vehicle has been maintained to a rigorous standard. It offers a seamless blend of performance and integrity, featuring a comprehensive service history and a well-preserved aesthetic. This is a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber vehicle that commands a steadfast presence on the road.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape—I’ve made sure to keep up with regular maintenance so it’s totally ready for its next adventure. If you’re looking for a reliable, well-loved car that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This high-revving mill utilizes individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to
Reliable daily driver. Clean title. Maintenance current. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smooth.

Presented in impressive condition, this vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains a reliable companion for any driver. The bodywork is straight, showcasing a vibrant finish with only the slightest evidence of its journey on the road. The interior is remarkably tidy, with well-preserved seating and a dashboard that remains free of cracks or fading. Under the hood, the powertrain is in excellent health, delivering consistent performance and a smooth, quiet idle. Recent service history is available, confirming that all vitals—from brakes to fluids—are in top shape. This is a solid, honest car that looks great and performs even better. It represents a fantastic opportunity to own a high-quality vehicle that has many years of dependable service ahead.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Offering a refined driving experience, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking both reliability and lasting value. We invite you to experience the superior handling and well-preserved interior of this standout selection.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and robust mechanical integrity, it delivers a sophisticated driving experience. Its aesthetic and functional condition remains highly commendable, offering exceptional value and long-term reliability for its next owner.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s still in such great shape! It’s been super reliable and drives like a dream, perfect for anyone looking for a solid, well-cared-for car that’s ready to hit the road immediately. You’re going to love how it handles—come take it for a spin!

This 996.2 Carrera features the high-revving 3.6L flat-six powerplant equipped with VarioCam Plus, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed G96 manual transaxle. The chassis retains its signature communicative feedback, benefiting from a well-sorted suspension geometry and staggered alloys. Mechanical highlights include a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recent cooling system overhaul. Braking is handled by four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors, providing exceptional thermal management. This is a mechanically sound, driver-focused example that offers a pure analog connection to the road.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, blending reliable performance with a clean, professional aesthetic. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor surface imperfections and light stone chipping consistent with responsible road use. Inside, the cabin remains a comfortable sanctuary; the upholstery is free of tears or stains, and the dashboard electronics, including the premium audio system and dual-zone climate control, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and a recent full synthetic oil change. The transmission shifts with precision, and the suspension provides a balanced, rattle-free ride. Equipped with a set of tires with ample tread remaining and brakes that bite firmly, this car is mechanically sound and aesthetically pleasing, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer looking for a dependable daily driver that has been truly cared for.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Combining robust mechanical integrity with a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar stands as a testament to diligent ownership and enduring performance.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it balances mechanical integrity with refined aesthetic appeal. Its performance remains robust, offering a driving experience that reflects consistent care and professional stewardship. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this well-preserved example of automotive engineering.

Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that’s been really well-loved? This car is in wonderful shape and drives like a total dream! It’s been my trusty companion for a while now, and I’ve made sure to keep it happy and healthy. Whether you’re heading out on a road trip or just cruising around town, it’s ready to go. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make its next owner very happy. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s example, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is managed via a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and delivered through a rear-mounted M-Variable differential lock. Mechanical highlights include a reinforced rear subframe—a critical preventative measure—and a recent rod bearing service to ensure long-term engine health. The chassis remains taut, utilizing a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear setup that provides exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback. This vehicle offers a visceral driving experience with the mechanical sound and linear power delivery only a naturally aspirated M-car can provide.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a perfect blend of reliability and style. Under the hood, the engine purrs and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a responsive driving experience that inspires confidence. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use, while the alloy wheels are wrapped in high-tread premium tires. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features well-preserved upholstery and a suite of fully functional electronics, from the crisp infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control. Recent service includes a comprehensive multi-point inspection, fresh fluids, and new brake pads, ensuring this car is road-ready from day one. It is a dependable, high-quality choice for anyone seeking a premium feel and a solid history of care.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by comprehensive mechanical integrity. A premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking documented quality and proven reliability.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and reliability. This specimen has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced combination of sophistication and durability, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been really well-loved and is totally ready for its next adventure? This car is in great shape and drives like an absolute dream. It’s been super dependable for me, and I’ve made sure to keep it looking sharp and running smoothly. It's perfect for zipping around town or hitting the open road. Come take it for a spin—I just know you're going to love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains exceptionally composed thanks to a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed suspension bushings, while the variable M differential lock ensures optimal power delivery through the twisties. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and shim-and-bucket valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates with mechanical precision. Finished in Carbon Black, this example exhibits honest patina consistent with its mileage but remains a mechanically sound platform for the purist seeking visceral analog feedback.
Solid condition. Mechanically sound. Minimal cosmetic wear. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use. Inside, you'll find a pristine cabin featuring premium materials that have been kept in excellent shape—no tears, stains, or odors. Every button, switch, and feature operates exactly as it should, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule; I have all records available for your review. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm and responsive

This exceptional vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and thoroughly inspected, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. With its robust mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetics, this offering stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking both value and prestige.
